title: How Claude Code's Creator ACTUALLY Automates his work
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes how Boris Cherny, creator of Claude Code, uses Claude Skills to automate work. The video breaks down three key strategies for maximizing Claude Code: agents, hooks, and loops/scheduling. Marchese presents this as a practical guide for leveraging underutilized features in Claude Code.
